pre_game.message: Hi, I'm J. It's pretty wild being in a room with nine strangers all after the same prize, right? What's the first thing you'd do if you won?
Hey J, I'm E. It's definitely a bit intense in here. Honestly, the first thing I'd do is help out my family and make sure they're taken care of—that's the main reason I'm here. What about you?
Same here. I want to set things up for the people I care about so they don't have to worry as much. It's definitely what's driving me to win this.
I hear you. It definitely makes the stakes feel higher when it's for the people you love. Have you thought much about how you're going to play this once it starts?
I’m honestly just trying to get a feel for everyone first. I’d love to see us all walk away with something, but I know it could get competitive. Do you have a plan yet?
Not a set plan yet, just trying to stay observant like you. I think we'll have to see how the rules play out, but I'm definitely open to working together if it helps us all get what we need.
I’m glad we’re on the same page. Working together sounds like a solid strategy to make sure we both come out ahead.
Exactly. Strength in numbers, right? Let's definitely keep talking as the game kicks off.
Definitely. Let's keep an eye on how things develop and stick together when it counts.
Sounds like a plan. I'm going to go see what some of the others are thinking. Talk soon!
Good idea, I'll see what I can find out too. Catch you in a bit.
